description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Add a before_script that runs 'yarn global add codecov' and then installs dependencies with 'yarn'. Define a single stage named test and a job called test that runs in this stage, executing 'yarn unit && codecov -t $CODECOV_TOKEN'. The job has no artifacts or special rules, so it runs on every pipeline.
